outfit_info.outfit_description: A young model wears a layered casual outfit, featuring a light blue denim jacket over a printed sweatshirt, paired with burgundy sweatpants and black combat boots. Accessories include a grey beanie with a teddy bear and a sequined crossbody bag, creating a cozy yet playful look suitable for an outdoor autumn day.

model_attributes.body: The model is a child with a slender build, exuding a natural and curious demeanor during outdoor exploration.
model_attributes.pose: Captured in a low crouch, the model leans forward to observe mushrooms on a log, indicating playful curiosity.
model_attributes.background: A serene, misty outdoor setting frames a tranquil river and a distant arched bridge under a soft, diffused morning light.
